description_long: This house features a rectangular footprint with a flat, brown-tiled roof and a small, white, modernist structure situated off-center. The main building appears to be a single-story unit with clean, geometric lines and minimal ornamentation. A small, white, rectangular extension or utility structure is visible on the roof, possibly representing a skylight, HVAC unit, or rooftop access. The roof is bordered by a subtle trim, and the surface is largely uninterrupted except for the two white structures. The exterior is predominantly brown with white accents, giving it a contemporary, minimalist appearance. There are no visible windows or doors on the roof, and the overall design suggests a modern, utilitarian residential building.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat, brown-tiled roof and minimalist white rooftop structures. The design is clean, geometric, and contemporary.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full brown-tiled roof and both white rooftop structures clearly.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main white structure and the smaller white extension on the roof's left side.
description_view_2: Rear view with the main white structure centered and the smaller white extension on the right.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the length of the brown roof and the white structures aligned along one edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist entryway, likely flush with the main structure, no visible steps or porch, clean lines
